No. 240 / 2024 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ HEARING OF PRIORITY. 1) For orders on office objection. 2) For hearing of main case. 3) For hearing of CMA No. 3176/2024. 23.05.2025. Mr. Barkat Ali Awan, Advocate for Applicant. Mr. Zohaib holding brief for Mr. Khalid Rajpar, Advocate for Respondent. ______________ Counsel holds brief for Mr. Khalid Rajpar and requests for adjournment as he is busy before another bench. At his request, adjourned. To come up on 29.08.2025. ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE J U D G E Arshad/
